notes: Alfred Linux 7.77 — sovereign desktop from Debian Trixie with Linux kernel.org 7.0.4 tree, Omahon Seal, and 42 Kingdom live-build hooks (Matthew 1:17 lineage; exactly one config/hooks/live/*.hook.chroot per lineage stage — superseded stages merged into parent files such as voice stack under 0400, sacred stillness under 0720). ISO builds run scripts/sync-canonical-to-build.sh before lb config (hooks + package-lists + packages.chroot + build-assets; Docker inner sets ALFRED_FULL_BUILD_ASSETS=1). AKJV — Authorized King Jesus Version, Perez Family Edition under /usr/share/alfred/bible/ when 0290 ships the full TSV. Bible tongues: hook 0292 embeds languages.conf with 48 data rows (Acts 2:4 breadth): en + es/fr/he rich seeds + 44 compact tongue-* seeds; api bible_tongues must equal that row count. AI: Omahon + Ollama primary; optional ai-providers.env for cloud APIs — backup only. First-boot TTS/he per README.
